name: Norlina Pool and Pickleball
description: Norlina Pool and Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Norlina, NC. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Warren Co Parks Rec Department
description: Warren Co Parks Rec Department is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Warrenton, NC. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Warren County Recreation Complex
description: Warren County Recreation Complex is a place to play pickleball in Warrenton, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
